steps.title: Focus on the requested difference
steps.content: The student wants a difference between the two books. The notes identify Equiano's book as an autobiography and Sinclair's book as fiction, so the best response should contrast those two literary forms.

steps.title: Reject shared-result choices
steps.content: Choice B mainly says both authors influenced readers. Choice C contrasts the laws that resulted from the books, not the books themselves. Choice D emphasizes that both works contributed to legislation. The answer is A.
